caption: In a legislative assembly hall, several rows of people sit behind wooden desks. Many of the men wear white shirts, while some wear dark vests or traditional caps, including one man in a yellow cap. A woman is visible in a red saree. The setting is formal, with muted green walls and structured seating. Throughout the sequence, the people remain largely stationary, though there are subtle movements in their postures. A man in a blue suit sits toward the left, and others are seated beside and behind him. The scene repeats almost identically across the frames, showing a steady shot of the assembly members during a session. There are no visible logos, equipment, or on-screen text. The lighting is consistent, and the overall atmosphere is one of formal deliberation.
